LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS IQBEL SINGH AND LILY CHAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER.
